info.title: AI Time-Manager API
info.description: API for AI-driven time management tool for Software Engineering students. Implements Google OAuth, Google Calendar integration, Gemini AI-driven project decomposition, and a greedy schedule optimizer.

post.description: Exchange Google OAuth 2.0 authorization code for a local JWT access token and synchronizes the user profile.

code.description: Google OAuth 2.0 authorization code received from the frontend

400.description: Validation error or invalid authorization code

500.description: Internal server error during Google API interaction

get.description: Returns details of the currently authenticated user, including their scheduling persona.

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid Bearer token

put.summary: Update user persona for AI scheduling
put.description: Updates user's academic and scheduling preferences (constraints, preferences, study limits). This configuration is used during AI scheduling.

200.description: Persona updated successfully. Returns the updated User profile.

get.description: Retrieves all courses registered to the authenticated user.

post.description: Create a custom course (subject) directly in the system.

400.description: Course name already exists or invalid payload

put.description: Modify the name of an existing course.

400.description: Validation error or course name duplication

delete.description: Deletes the course and all associated projects and study sessions cascade-style.

get.description: Retrieves the projects list. Supports filtering by course or completion status.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by completion status. 'completed' projects are those with all sessions completed. 'active' projects have scheduled or missed sessions.

post.description: Manually add an academic task/project. This triggers the Gemini AI workflow to decompose the project into sessions, followed by scheduling.

201.description: Project created and sessions successfully generated

400.description: Validation error or project name duplicate inside course

post.summary: Import projects via JSON, trigger AI breakdown and scheduling
post.description: Allows bulk import of unstructured course assignments. Automatically parses course names, creates courses, invokes Gemini for project complexity analysis + breakdown, and applies the greedy scheduler.

get.description: Fetch a single project with its generated study sessions nested inside.

put.description: Update project details (title, deadline). If the deadline is moved earlier, the backend verifies that existing study sessions can still fit before the new deadline.

400.description: Validation error or schedule constraint violation (sessions exceed new deadline)

delete.description: Deletes the project and all of its associated study sessions.

get.description: Retrieves sessions with filtering options. Primarily used for calendar views.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Filter sessions belonging to a specific project

post.description: Create a custom study block manually. User can specify absolute times, or leave them null for the scheduler to populate.

put.description: Modify session parameters. Mainly used for drag-and-drop actions on frontend (updating dates) or completing/failing a session.

400.description: Validation error, overlapping with busy calendar slot, or exceeding user's daily hour limits

delete.description: Removes a specific study session. (Useful if the user decides certain prep tasks aren't necessary).

post.summary: Sync with Google Calendar and schedule unscheduled sessions
post.description: Fetches occupied slots from Google Calendar API, respects user's persona limits, and executes the scheduling algorithm on all currently unscheduled StudySessions.

502.description: Bad Gateway - Google Calendar API error

post.summary: Manually recalculate missed sessions to future slots
post.description: Identifies SCHEDULED sessions in the past, marks them as MISSED, and runs the Greedy Scheduler algorithm to relocate them to available future slots without overlapping Google Calendar entries.

get.summary: Get calendar grid data (Hash Map grouped by date)
get.description: Fetches aggregated calendar data within a date range. Responses return a map of dates containing sessions and academic deadlines.
Calculates overall course/project metrics, upcoming top 5 deadlines, and today's scheduling agenda. Runs efficient aggregated database operations.

BearerAuth.description: Enter your JWT token in the format: Bearer <token>

studyOnWeekends.description: Whether sessions can be scheduled on weekends

maxHoursPerDay.description: Maximum study hours per day constraint

courseId.description: Target course ID. If not found, backend will return 404.

isCompromised.description: Indicates if the session was scheduled using fallback constraints (e.g. outside preferred time, on weekends, or past deadline)

compromiseReason.description: Explanation of why the session's constraints were violated

courseName.description: Name of the course. The backend will perform a safe upsert based on (userId, courseName).

token.description: JWT Access Token for Bearer authentication headers

calendar.description: Date keyed objects containing arrays of sessions and deadlines scheduled for those days

isCompromised.description: Indicates if the session was scheduled using fallback constraints

compromiseReason.description: Explanation of why the session's constraints were violated

isCompromised.description: Indicates if the session was scheduled using fallback constraints

compromiseReason.description: Explanation of why the session's constraints were violated

tags.name: Study Sessions
tags.description: Study session blocks, status updates and operations

tags.name: Calendar
tags.description: Google Calendar sync, recalculations and view aggregation
